Record Class StatSnapshot

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.StatSnapshot
Record Components:
todayMinutes - total valid listening time today in minutes
todayAvgSessionSeconds - elapsed seconds since the user logged in, used as the average session duration stat
todayTopSong - the most played Song today, or null if no valid plays exist
todayTopAlbum - the most played Album today, or null if no valid plays exist
weeklyTopSong - the most played Song this week, or null if no valid plays exist
weeklyTopAlbum - the most played Album this week, or null if no valid plays exist
public record StatSnapshot(int todayMinutes, int todayAvgSessionSeconds, Song todayTopSong, Album todayTopAlbum, Song weeklyTopSong, Album weeklyTopAlbum) extends Record
All stat-card values derived from a single database fetch. Consumed by StatCardsViewModel instead of calling individual getters separately.

todayAvgSessionSeconds is the duration of the current in-memory session (login time to now), sourced from UserSessionService.getSessionDurationSeconds(). No database involvement. Session history is lost on application restart.

  • Constructor Details

    • StatSnapshot

      public StatSnapshot(int todayMinutes, int todayAvgSessionSeconds, Song todayTopSong, Album todayTopAlbum, Song weeklyTopSong, Album weeklyTopAlbum)
      Creates an instance of a StatSnapshot record class.
      Parameters:
      todayMinutes - the value for the todayMinutes record component
      todayAvgSessionSeconds - the value for the todayAvgSessionSeconds record component
      todayTopSong - the value for the todayTopSong record component
      todayTopAlbum - the value for the todayTopAlbum record component
      weeklyTopSong - the value for the weeklyTopSong record component
      weeklyTopAlbum - the value for the weeklyTopAlbum record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
